data.title: RED: Write test for worktree retention protocol
data.description:
## Description

Write failing tests verifying worktree retention:

1. test_worktree_retained_during_review: Create worktree, simulate review, assert worktree exists
2. test_worktree_retained_during_merge: Create worktree, simulate merge, assert worktree exists
3. test_worktree_cleanup_after_merge: After merge, verify worktree can be removed

### Files to modify
- tests/hooks/test-worktree-retention.sh (CREATE)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-worktree-retention.sh
- [ ] At least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'echo.*---.*test_' tests/hooks/test-worktree-retention.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
